webCameraUnavailable: Taking a photo is only available in the mobile app. Please use "Choose Photo" on web.
photoLibraryPermission: We need photo library access to update the photo.
cameraPermission: We need camera access to take a photo.

unsavedChanges.title: Unsaved Changes
unsavedChanges.message: You have unsaved changes. If you leave now, your edits will be lost.

fields.name: Name
fields.nicknamePlaceholder: What they prefer to be called
fields.identifyingMarksPlaceholder: Tattoos, scars, birthmarks, glasses, hearing aids...
fields.identifyingMarksHint: Anything that would help identify them
fields.cognitiveStatusPlaceholder: Moderate dementia; may be disoriented; responds to first name
fields.cognitiveStatusHint: How do they typically present? What should responders expect?
fields.dominantHandHint: People often veer in the direction of their dominant hand when lost
fields.communicationPreferencePlaceholder: Speaking, non-speaking, uses gestures, sign language...
fields.escalationSignsPlaceholder: Crying, running, rocking, aggression, shutting down...
fields.escalationSignsHint: Signs that they are becoming distressed
fields.deescalationTechniquesPlaceholder: Calm voice, short sentences, favorite song, show family photo...
fields.deescalationTechniquesHint: What has helped calm them in the past?
fields.approachGuidancePlaceholder: Approach slowly from the front, introduce yourself, keep distance...
fields.likesPlaceholder: Favorite music, TV shows, toys, foods, activities...
fields.likesHint: What makes them feel safe or happy?
fields.dislikesTriggersPlaceholder: Loud noises, crowds, being touched, flashing lights...
fields.safeWordPlaceholder: A word or phrase that indicates you are a safe person
fields.locativeDeviceInfoPlaceholder: Personal locator (e.g., AirTag on keys/bag, watch beacon)
fields.locativeDeviceInfoHint: Optional: only include devices they already use
